  "claims": [
    "The budget investment will go towards digitizing the archives of the Chinese Historical Society of America.",
    "The funding will be invested in augmented reality and virtual reality assets for museum programming.",
    "CHSA aims to transform its 20,000+ artifact archive into an augmented reality and virtual reality learning resource.",
